content.text: I'll help you upgrade your Node.js runtime to the latest LTS version using the Mittwald MCP tools. Let me start by discovering your current application and environment setup.

input.description: Discover Node.js applications and current runtime versions
input.prompt:
I need to discover what Node.js applications are available through the Mittwald MCP server and what their current runtime versions are. Please use the MCP tools to:

1. List all available applications in the Mittwald ecosystem
2. Identify which ones are Node.js applications
3. Check their current Node.js runtime versions
4. Determine what the latest Node.js LTS version is

Use the Mittwald MCP tools available to gather this information. I'm working in the directory /Users/robert/Code/mittwald-mcp/.worktrees/008-mcp-server-instruction/tests/functional

The MCP server is available at https://mittwald-mcp-fly2.fly.dev/mcp

Return a summary of:
- All Node.js applications found
- Their current runtime versions
- The latest Node.js LTS version available
- Which applications need updating
